footer.compliance: AltheaSystems - e-commerce. Data is processed according to applicable regulations.

cart.title: Cart
cart.unavailableLine: This product is no longer available

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.success: Thank you! Your payment was accepted.
checkout.successHint: You will receive a confirmation email when your order is registered.
checkout.paymentNotReady: The payment form is still loading. Wait a moment and try again.
checkout.paymentProcessing: Payment is processing. You will be redirected or receive a confirmation email.
checkout.paymentLoading: Connecting to Stripe… The Pay button enables once the form is ready.
checkout.paymentLoadError: Could not load the payment form (network, ad blocker, or Stripe key).
checkout.guestAddressHint: As a guest, this address is used for local delivery display; the order uses payment-side data on the server.

auth.confirmSuccess: Your registration is confirmed. You can now sign in.
auth.adminRedirect: You are an administrator: please use the admin panel.

accountPayments.subtitle: Cards saved through Stripe (identifiers returned by the API after a saved payment).
accountPayments.fetchError: Could not load your payment methods.
accountPayments.emptyDescription: Your future cards will appear here after your first successful payment.
accountPayments.emptyHint: Tip: complete a checkout with card payment to automatically register it on your account.
accountPayments.addDescription: Fill in only the required details for secure display.

testsUnit.title: Unit tests
testsUnit.subtitle: This page summarizes the unit tests implemented in the storefront and what they validate.

smokePages.title: Page smoke tests
smokePages.description: Renders every main page in isolation to ensure no crash occurs at mount.

orderHistory.title: Order history
orderHistory.description: Validates reverse-chronological grouping, status badges, and formats shown in the customer area.

contact.title: Contact
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.human: A human can take over the conversation.
contact.chatWelcome: Hello and welcome to AltheaSystems. I am your assistant, how can I help you today?
contact.toolsIntro: Use the full form to reach support, or chat with our assistant for an immediate answer before optional escalation to a human agent.
contact.chatSectionSubtitle: Instant answers, basic details capture, and automatic escalation to an agent when needed.
contact.chatTyping: The chatbot is writing a reply…
contact.escalationDescription: Describe your request. It will be saved in the back office with the chat history.
contact.profileRequiredBeforeChat: Please enter your name and email before starting the conversation.
contact.profileRequiredWidget: Please enter your name and email.
contact.formSuccessMessage: Your request has been sent to support.
contact.escalationSuccessMessage: Your request has been forwarded to a human agent.
contact.widgetEscalationHint: Need a human agent? Send your request.
contact.widgetSupportSuccess: Your request has been sent to support.
contact.widgetPoweredByMistral: Mistral AI answers & general medical FAQ
contact.widgetEmailCaptureSubtitle: We use them to personalize the chat and support follow-up (MongoDB + back office).
contact.widgetMedicalDisclaimer: General information on medical equipment only — not personal medical advice. In an emergency, call emergency services or your doctor.
